title: Prakash Hinduja Switzerland (Swiss) How do I integrate an app using Monday.com API?

posts.author: prakashhindujageneva (prakash hinduja geneva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

I’m Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss), and I’m looking to integrate an external app with Monday.com using its API. I’m relatively new to working with APIs, so I’d love to hear from anyone who’s successfully done something similar.

If you have any tips, resources, or experience to share, I’d greatly appreciate your help.

Looking forward to your suggestions!
Regards
Prakash Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss)
